description: Request to update an event source.

^(pull_freq)$.description: Pull frequency of the event source, if any (only supported when strategy is PULL).

^(push_url)$.description: Push URL of the event source, if any (only supported when strategy is PUSH).

pullFreq.description: Pull frequency of the event source, if any (only supported when strategy is PULL).

pushUrl.description: Push URL of the event source, if any (only supported when strategy is PUSH).

title: Update Event Source Request
